user_prompt: The graviton cannon awaits a purification
prayer:
Approach the graviton cannon with mechano-sanctified gauntlets, intoning the Canticle of Purity.
Beseech the Omnissiah to purge impurities from the graviton cannon's warp-attenuating coils during this rite of purification.
Anoint the emitter matrices with blessed unguents, invoking the Machine Spirit's unyielding vigilance.
Chant the Rite of Flux Stabilization as diagnostic auspex scans affirm the graviton cannon's restored sanctity.
Seal the purification with the Sigil of the Motive Force, ensuring harmonious gravitic resonance.

user_prompt: Prepare the transit mag-rail for blessing
prayer:
Kneel before the transit mag-rail, reciting the Benediction of Velocity to awaken its ferrous heart.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the transit mag-rail, bestowing the blessing through electro-incantatory pulses.
Circumambulate the rail's magnetic conduits, asperging sacred oils to exalt the Machine Spirit within.
Align the induction coils with precisional theodolites whilst murmuring the Litany of Swift Passage.
Conclude the blessing by activating test cycles, verifying the transit mag-rail's exalted operational purity.

user_prompt: Sanctify the doctrina wafer during purification
prayer:
Present the doctrina wafer upon the altar of cogitation, commencing the purification with whispered binaric psalms.
Scour the doctrina wafer's noospheric engrams of heretical data-slates via the Omnissiah's purifying flame.
Immerse the wafer in sanctified nano-fluids, beseeching the Machine Spirits to reaffirm doctrinal orthodoxy.
Reinsert the purified doctrina wafer into the enginseer's cranial socket, intoning vows of unerring loyalty.
Validate sanctity through noetic resonance scans, glorifying the doctrina wafer's renewed imperium.

user_prompt: The Archaeopter Transvector awaits a cooling
prayer:
Encircle the Archaeopter Transvector's heat-sinks with cooling servitors, invoking the Chill of the Void.
Initiate the cooling rite upon the Archaeopter Transvector, channeling cryonic gases blessed by the Omnissiah.
Chant the Mantra of Thermal Equilibrium over the Archaeopter Transvector's plasma vents, appeasing its Machine Spirit.
Monitor thermocouples with vox-amplified litanies, ensuring the Archaeopter Transvector's fuselage attains frigid perfection.
Seal the cooling with ablative seals, proclaiming the Archaeopter Transvector fit for stratospheric ascension.

user_prompt: Ready the autosanguination system for cooling
prayer:
Isolate the autosanguination system's vitae conduits, beginning the cooling with invocations to the Blood of Mars.
Direct refrigerated mechfluid through the autosanguination system, purging febrile excesses in the Omnissiah's name.
Anoint the filtration manifolds of the autosanguination system, beseeching its sanguine Machine Spirit to endure.
Recite the Canticle of Coagulated Calm as auspex probes confirm thermal homeostasis within the autosanguination system.
Reintegrate the cooled autosanguination system, affirming its vital flow for endless servitor endurance.

user_prompt: The water reclamator needs a consecration
prayer:
Position the water reclamator before the shrine of Hydro-Magnus, intoning the Consecration of Aqueous Essence.
Consecrate the water reclamator's filtration membranes with droplets from the Omnissiah's own forge-wells.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of purity upon the water reclamator, sanctifying its reclamation cycles eternally.
Circulate blessed recyclytes through the water reclamator, chanting hymns of hydrological redemption.
Affix the seal of consecration, ensuring the water reclamator yields only the holiest sustenance.

user_prompt: How do I bless the Storm Eagle for maintenance?
prayer:
Approach the Storm Eagle with reverence, reciting the Maintenance Doxology to rouse its thunderous Machine Spirit.
Conduct maintenance upon the Storm Eagle by anointing its auspex arrays and turbine nacelles with sacred mech-lubricants.
Beseech the Omnissiah for structural integrity as you recalibrate the Storm Eagle's drop-pod bays.
Purge corrosion from the Storm Eagle's adamantium frame via electro-purification rites.
Finalize maintenance with a test-hover, proclaiming the Storm Eagle's wrathful readiness restored.

user_prompt: Urgent Archaeopter Stratoraptor a synchronization needed
prayer:
Assemble the cranial cogitators around the Archaeopter Stratoraptor, initiating synchronization with binaric harmonies.
Link the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's noospheric interfaces, invoking the Omnissiah's synchronal will upon its avionic core.
Chant the Rite of Synaptic Alignment to harmonize the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's Machine Spirits in unity.
Verify synchronization through oscillatory auspex waves, ensuring the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's predatory precision.
Seal the rite with a galvanic oath, binding the Archaeopter Stratoraptor to flawless hunter-kill protocols.

user_prompt: Critical: lance battery requires a recalibration
prayer:
Converge upon the lance battery's targeting cogitators, commencing recalibration with the Litany of Precision Fire.
Recalibrate the lance battery's focusing crystals via las-etched sigils of the Omnissiah's unerring aim.
Beseech the Machine Spirits within the lance battery to realign their stellar fury without deviation.
Test-fire micro-bolts into the void, intoning corrective canticles until the lance battery sings true.
Conclude with ablative wards, affirming the lance battery's apocalyptic recalibration.

user_prompt: The utility mechadendrite awaits a repair
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites to cradle the utility mechadendrite, invoking the Repair of the Omnissiah's Appendages.
Diagnose fractures in the utility mechadendrite's servo-fibers, purging warp-taint with sanctified weld-arcs.
Reconstruct the utility mechadendrite's manipular claws, beseeching its diligent Machine Spirit to reawaken.
Anoint fresh servomotors within the utility mechadendrite, reciting vows of tireless ministration.
Cycle the repaired utility mechadendrite through operational litanies, glorifying its renewed utility.
